steps.title: Identify the slope in the linear function
steps.content: The function $w(t) = 600 - 3t$ is linear. Rewrite it as $w(t) = 600 + (-3)t$. The coefficient of $t$ is the slope: $-3$.

steps.title: Interpret the slope as the rate of change per second
steps.content:
In a linear function, the slope tells us the rate of change of the output per unit change in the input.

A slope of $-3$ means the volume decreases by 3 milliliters for each 1-second increase in $t$.

The predicted volume draining from the container each second is therefore 3 milliliters.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
